name: Benzyl Alcohol
description: Aromatic alcohol used in fragrances, cosmetics, and as a solvent.

name: Benzaldehyde
description: Almond-scented aldehyde used in flavors, fragrances, and dyes.

name: Benzyl Chloride
description: Reactive intermediate for benzyl compounds and quaternary ammonium salts.

name: Benzoic Acid
description: Preservative and precursor to benzoate plasticizers.

name: Toluene Diisocyanate
description: Key feedstock for flexible polyurethane foams.
